mapper.select: SELECT member_id, name, email, password, role, created_at, updated_at FROM member ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(member_id, name, email, password, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'user'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
